title: lucuma meruocana
intro: Lucuma meruocana, also known as the yellow lucuma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae, native to the Andean region of South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lucuma meruocana include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Lucuma meruocana is traditionally prepared as a tea, infusion, or juice, and is also used as an ingredient in various herbal remedies and supplements.
